TCA-IRR
    Back to Help & Support

    Understanding Your Report

    Learn what each section of the analysis means for both Triage and Due Diligence reports.

    Decoding the Triage Report
    A breakdown of the high-level Triage report (typically 5-6 pages), designed for initial screening. This report is structured into 21 distinct sections for a quick yet comprehensive overview.
    View Sample Triage Report
    Visibility Legend: 🔓 Visible to all | 🔐 Visible only to Admin / Analyst | 🚫 Hidden if data not available
    #Section TitleOutput DescriptionVisibility
    0Quick SummaryCompany, sector, date, valuation, round, runtime, report version, export buttons🔓 All (CI 🔐)
    1TCA summary score card: Triage ClassificationTotal score, Score average ( after 30 times run), Std Dev, 🔐 Confidence Interval, Tier Level🔓 All (CI 🔐)
    2TCA AI Table – 12 CategoriesTable: Raw Score, Weight, Weighted Score, Flag, PESTEL, Description, Strengths, Concerns🔓 All
    3AI Interpretation SummaryGPT narrative on triage outcome, highlights, risk-opportunity balance🔓 All
    4TCA 12 score, Weighted Score Breakdown, and detailed analysisSector-adjusted total score calculation🔓 All
    5Risk Flag Summary Table (14 Domains)Summary of top risks, breakdown of analysis, flags, descriptions, mitigations, and thresholds.🔓 All
    6Flag Analysis NarrativeGPT-generated narrative of risk flags and triggers🔓 All
    7Macro Trend Alignment TableComparison with macro PESTEL signals, sector outlook🔓 All
    8Benchmark OverlayScore vs sector average, percentile, deviation, and gap analysis.🔓 All
    9Growth Classifier Matrix6-model DSS, detailed calculator (🔐 Admin/Analyst Only), best/base/worst scenarios, and classification score.🔓 All
    10Historical Comparison Strategy Fit MatrixScore trend (Δ vs last), performance direction🔓 All
    11Consistency Check, quality, and statisticsText coherence, score-comment match, pitch vs score stability, and more.🔐 Admin/Analyst Only
    12Founder Fit + Team Assessment TableGPT review of founder/team alignment, fit, and gaps.🔓 All
    13Analyst Comments & Sentiment AnalysisHuman Analyst input summary, sentiment, and tone.🔓 All (🚫 if N/A)
    14Analyst–AI Deviation ChartScore deviation (AI vs Analyst), rationale, and visuals.🔓 All
    15Analyst Theme Analysis (NLP + Manual)GPT & manual themes (team, IP, GTM), keyword extraction, tone, topic cluster.🔓 All
    16Final Flag Summary & Threshold TableFull table of triggers, thresholds, and mitigation guidance per risk domain.🔓 All
    17Final RecommendationAI and Analyst recommendation with rationale🔓 All
    18Admin Final Approval Panel[🔘 Prescreen] [🔘 Full Screening] [🟥 Reject] buttons to lock outcome🔐 Admin/Analyst Only
    19Export & Superset LinksPDF / DOCX / MD / XLSX / JSON downloads + Superset chart link (if enabled)🔓 All
    20AppendixJSON view of weights, flags, benchmark rules, classifier settings, detailed recommendation, and summary notes.🔓 All
